memoryArtifacts.headline: Seal of Albert IV, Count of Habsburg

popularStory.headline: Albert IV le Sage (1188-1239)
popularStory.description:
Albert IV le Sage né en 1188; mort le 13 décembre 1239; comte de Habsbourg et landgrave de Haute-Alsace, fils de Rodolphe II l'Ancien et d'Agnès de Staufen.

À la mort de Rodolphe II l'Ancien (1232), …

sourceList.title: Wikipedia Biography - Albert IV, Count of Habsburg
Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - ALBRECHT [IV] "der Weise" (-near Ascalon, Palestine 22 Nov 1240).

zh.Limberg, Sasbach am Kaiserstuhl, Amt Bre: 巴登阿赤 布萊薩賀薩斯巴賀 阿姆 凱澤斯圖爾利波格
zh.lifeSummary: 當Albrecht IV von Habsburg於1192年出生在瑞士阿高哈布斯堡時，他的父親Rudolf II von Habsburg22歲，母親Agnes von Staufen30歲。他於1215年與Heilwig Gräfin von Kyburg結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1240年11月22日在巴勒斯坦享年48歲。

zh-hans.Limberg, Sasbach am Kaiserstuhl, Amt Bre: 巴登阿赤 布萊薩賀薩斯巴賀 阿姆 凱澤斯圖爾利波格
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Albrecht IV von Habsburg于1192年出生在瑞士阿高哈布斯堡时，他的父亲Rudolf II von Habsburg22岁，母亲Agnes von Staufen30岁。他于1215年与Heilwig Gräfin von Kyburg结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1240年11月22日在巴勒斯坦享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Albrecht
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Albrecht IV von Habsburg was born in 1192, in Habsburg, Aargau, Switzerland, his father, Rudolf II von Habsburg, was 22 and his mother, Agnes von Staufen, was 30. He married Heilwig Gräfin von Kyburg in 1215. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 22 November 1240, in Palestine, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Albrecht IV von Habsburg est né en 1192, à Habsburg, Argovie, Suisse, son père, Rudolf II von Habsburg, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Agnes von Staufen, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Heilwig Gräfin von Kyburg en 1215. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 22 novembre 1240, à Palestine, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Albrecht IV von Habsburg 1192 in Habsburg, Aargau, Schweiz geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rudolf II von Habsburg 22 und seine Mutter Agnes von Staufen 30. Er hat 1215 Heilwig Gräfin von Kyburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 22. November 1240 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Palästina.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Albrecht IV von Habsburg è nato il nel 1192 nel Habsburg, Argovia, Svizzera, il suo padre, Rudolf II von Habsburg, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Agnes von Staufen, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Heilwig Gräfin von Kyburg nel 1215. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 22 novembre 1240, nel Palestina, all'età di 48 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Albrecht IV von Habsburg(이)가 1192년 스위스 아아르가 하브스버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rudolf II von Habsburg(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes von Staufen(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1215년 Heilwig Gräfin von Kyburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1240년 11월 22일 팔레스타인에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Heilwig Gräfin von Kyburg em 1215. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de novembro de 1240, em Palestina, com 48 anos.

ru.Limberg, Sasbach am Kaiserstuhl, Amt Bre: лимбирг, сасбач ам кеисирстухл, амт брисач, баден
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Albrecht IV von Habsburg родился в 1192 г. в местности хабсбург, ааргау, Швейцария, его отцу по имени Rudolf II von Habsburg было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes von Staufen, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Heilwig Gräfin von Kyburg в 1215 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 22 ноября 1240 г. в местности Палестина в возрасте 48 лет.

Se casó con Heilwig Gräfin von Kyburg en 1215. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 22 de noviembre de 1240, en Palestina, a la edad de 48 años.
